---
title: Projects/Tools
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-shell page-shell-inner">
  <section class="section reveal">
    <div class="section-heading">
      <p class="eyebrow">Projects/Tools</p>
      <h2>R, tooling, and a few small experiments.</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="split-text">
      <p>
        A growing part of my work is building internal tooling that makes statistical workflows
        more robust, more efficient, and easier to operationalize. That includes R packages, Shiny
        applications, and other tools that support real-world evidence generation in practice.
      </p>
      <p>
        This page will eventually hold more concrete examples. For now, it acts as a placeholder
        for the kinds of work I care about most: durable analysis infrastructure, better scientific
        workflows, and thoughtful uses of AI alongside strong statistical judgment.
      </p>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="section reveal" id="lab">
    <div class="section-heading">
      <p class="eyebrow">Lab Notes</p>
      <h2>A few quiet data-science easter eggs.</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="lab-grid">
      <article class="console-card">
        <div class="console-topbar">
          <span></span>
          <span></span>
          <span></span>
        </div>
        <p class="console-label">R session</p>
        <pre class="console-output" id="console-output">> source("ideas.R")
[1] "Ready"</pre>
        <button class="button button-secondary console-button" id="console-button" type="button">
          Run another line
        </button>
      </article>

      <article class="study-card-game">
        <p class="game-kicker">Mini study design shuffle</p>
        <h3>Assemble a stronger RWE study.</h3>
        <p class="game-copy">
          Shuffle the design cards to see how different ingredients change the study's
          "regulatory confidence" score.
        </p>
        <div class="study-stack" id="study-stack">
          <div class="study-pill">
            <span class="study-pill-label">Comparator</span>
            <strong id="card-comparator">Active comparator</strong>
          </div>
          <div class="study-pill">
            <span class="study-pill-label">Index date</span>
            <strong id="card-index">Clearly anchored</strong>
          </div>
          <div class="study-pill">
            <span class="study-pill-label">Confounding plan</span>
            <strong id="card-confounding">Propensity score weighting</strong>
          </div>
          <div class="study-pill">
            <span class="study-pill-label">Endpoint</span>
            <strong id="card-endpoint">Clinically meaningful</strong>
          </div>
          <div class="study-pill">
            <span class="study-pill-label">Sensitivity analysis</span>
            <strong id="card-sensitivity">Multiple falsification checks</strong>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="game-footer">
          <div class="confidence-score">
            <span>Regulatory confidence</span>
            <strong id="confidence-score">88</strong>
          </div>
          <button class="button button-primary" id="shuffle-button" type="button">
            Shuffle Study
          </button>
        </div>
        <p class="game-note" id="game-note">
          A thoughtful comparator and strong sensitivity checks tend to travel well.
        </p>
      </article>
    </div>
  </section>
</div>
```
